See all time tools →

Why Gusto

You’re three steps away from easy, automated payroll.
Create an account.

Add your people.

Run your first payroll.

Get started
Frequently Asked Questions
What does Gusto do?
Gusto is an all-in-one payroll and HR platform that helps businesses take care of their teams. We handle payroll, taxes, and compliance automatically, so you don’t have to stress about the paperwork. Gusto also offers tools for hiring, onboarding, time tracking, benefits, and more—making it easier to manage the people side of your business.
Does Gusto work in Canada?
While our core payroll product is designed for US-based businesses, we do have two options to pay team members in Canada. You can hire full-time employees through our
Employer-of-Record (EOR) service
powered by Remote, or you can easily hire and pay international contractors through our
international contractor add-on
.
What is Gusto used for?
Gusto is used by businesses to manage payroll, HR, and employee benefits all in one place. It automates payroll processing, calculates and files taxes, and helps onboard new employees quickly and easily. Gusto also offers tools for time tracking, hiring, employee benefits, and compliance—making it a go-to platform for handling the people side of running a business.
How expensive is Gusto?
Gusto is one of the most affordable payroll and HR platforms on the market, with plans starting at just $49/mo + $6/mo per person. Our Plus and Premium plans come loaded with even more features including advanced hiring, time tracking, benefits, and compliance support.
Check out our full list of plans and features here
.
Can Gusto handle both contractors and full-time employees?
Absolutely! Gusto makes it easy to hire, onboard, and pay both contractors and full-time employees.
Is Gusto easy to set up and use?
Gusto is consistently rated as one of the most user-friendly payroll platforms on the market. We designed everything with you in mind making it easy to pay and manage your team—even if you're not a payroll expert. We guide you step by step through setup, from entering company info to adding employees and connecting your bank account. Once you’re up and running, tasks like running payroll, managing benefits, and tracking time are simple and intuitive. Plus, we offer helpful support resources and live assistance if you need a hand.
Questions? Meet answers.

Your Opt Out Preference Signal is Honored
Privacy Preference Center
Gusto and its advertising partners use cookies and other tracking technologies in order to, among other things, improve and personalize the website and show you ads promoting Gusto products, services, and features on other sites or apps that you may use or visit. Under some applicable privacy laws, these advertising activities may be considered a “sale” or “share” of data, or “targeted advertising". To opt out of these uses or disclosures, you can update your consent preferences by sliding the toggles to the left and then clicking the “Confirm My Choices” button.
Consent preferences set using the toggles will only apply to the web browser you’re currently using. You will need to update your preferences for each different device or browser you use to visit our website unless you have a Gusto account and are logged in. If you clear your cookies, your preferences will also reset.
We may also disclose personal information, such as your name, email address, and contact information to our partners so they can show you ads that are more relevant to your interests or market their products or services to you. To opt-out of “sales” or “sharing” of your data, or “targeted advertising” associated with your personal information, please complete our
Opt-Out Form
.
For more details, please read our Privacy Notice.
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

What to consider when choosing a payroll provider.
Does this work for teams my size?
Gusto was built for all kinds of teams. Some services are perfect for big corporations but overlook the needs of small businesses. That's why a flexible payroll and benefits provider is so important. Whether you have a handful of employees or your company is quickly expanding into new states, Gusto's platform offers flexible plans that cover everything from the basics to expert tools for fast-growing teams. Plus, you can easily upgrade or downgrade at any time.
What's included in pricing?
We believe the most essential tools should be included—that's why we don't charge extra for basic things like off-cycle payrolls. With Gusto, you can pick the best plan for you, then customize it with add-ons to get the powerful functionality you want while saving money on features you don't need.
Is it easy to switch?
Transferring your payroll data to a new provider can be daunting and tedious. With Gusto, you have someone to explain the process and help you through any tricky twists and turns. And if you have a larger team, we can often handle payroll data transfers on your behalf to help avoid errors and save you time. The same goes for your health benefits — we're happy to transfer eligible plans right into Gusto so you can keep everything in the same place, all automatically synced with payroll.
Will this grow with my business?
Think about how much your team might grow in the coming years. You'll want a payroll provider who can continue to serve your needs without making you jump through hoops or pay exorbitant additional costs. Gusto is a strong choice for small and medium sized companies with big aspirations. We understand your unique needs today and are committed to helping your team grow and thrive for years to come.
Pricing FAQs
Can I upgrade or downgrade at any time?
Yes, of course! Gusto was built to grow and evolve with your business. Whether you decide you need new features, or aren't using the ones you have, upgrading your plan will kick in immediately, and downgrades will go into effect at the beginning of the next billing period (the first of the month).
Do I have to sign a long-term contract?
Nope. Gusto is month-to-month. Cancel anytime.
How many times can I run payroll per month?
Every Gusto plan comes with unlimited payroll runs. We'll never charge you extra for things like off-cycle payrolls.
How much does health insurance administration through Gusto cost?
With Gusto as your broker, health insurance administration comes at no extra cost. You'll only pay the cost of the insurance premium. Need a quote? We have licensed advisors who can walk you through the process.
Want to keep your broker? For only $6/month per eligible employee, your broker can manage your plans right in Gusto. And Premium plan customers can integrate their health insurance broker for free.
What if my number of employees changes throughout the year?
With Gusto, you're only charged for active employees. As you add new team members, your monthly price will increase.
How do you bill for contractors?
U.S. contractors are billed at the per-person cost for any plan you select. We know you might not pay your contractors on a regular schedule, so we only bill you for contractors in months when you've paid them. For businesses who don't have any W-2 employees, we also have a Contractor Only plan available for $35/mo + $6/mo per contractor.
When you pay global contractors, there is no monthly per-contractor fee. Gusto charges only a small service and foreign exchange fee for each payment.
How do I sign up for Gusto?
We're happy to help whether you need to
set up your first payroll
as a new business (congrats!) or
transfer an existing payroll
from another provider (good choice).
Click here
to answer a few questions and get started.
If you are moving an existing payroll, you're going to want to have your EIN, and your team's addresses and salaries ready. Plus, if it's the middle of the year, gather any documentation about the payroll taxes you've already filed.
What tax forms will Gusto file for me?
We file federal, state, and local payroll tax forms on your company's behalf (things like Form W-2, Form 1099, Form 940, Form 941, Form 8974, and others). What's extra nice is that you can e-file, e-sign, e-fax, and e-store your documents right from your Gusto account. Easy!
Does Gusto integrate with other software?
We know it's hard to give up the software you love. That's why Gusto integrates with your favorite tools. We work with accounting programs like QuickBooks, Xero, Aplos, ZipBooks, Autobooks, and FreshBooks, plus other types of software like Expensify, Hubstaff, Clover, Homebase and more.
Check out all of our integrations
Where can I find Gusto pricing for accountants?
Being a Gusto accounting or bookkeeping partner comes with a ton of benefits — dedicated support, free payroll for your firm, people advisory training, increased revenue share, and perks to pass along to your clients.
Check out our Gusto for Partners page
or email
advisor@gusto.com
to learn more.
My business works with cannabis — can I use Gusto?
Yes. Gusto supports cannabis-related businesses (CRBs) across our Simple, Plus, and Premium payroll plans.
Because CRBs operate under additional banking and regulatory oversight, some plans require a
CRB compliance add-on
to support the extra monitoring, reporting, and operational work involved in running payroll for this industry.
Click here
for more info.
What level of support can I expect with my plan?
There are three types of support at Gusto:
Basic Support:
24/7 access to Gusto's online Help Center
Call or chat with our support team during our business hours
Priority Support:
Gain prioritized positioning in access to phone and chat support for faster response time
Dedicated Service Advisor:
Get a dedicated advisor for personalized Gusto support, maximizing your business growth and success
For the Simple plan:
You get Basic Support, and you can purchase the Priority Support add-on for $30/mo + $3/mo per person
For the Plus plan:
You get Basic Support, and you can purchase the two-in-one add-on (Priority Support and HR Resources) at $8/mo per person
For the Premium plan:
You get Priority Support and a Dedicated Service Advisor
Where can I find more answers?
If you're shopping around, we recommend exploring our site a bit — you'll find information about
payroll
,
benefits
,
time tools
, and more. Plus, our
Help Center
has lots of help information, especially for

Privacy Preference Center
Gusto and its advertising partners use cookies and other tracking technologies in order to, among other things, improve and personalize the website and show you ads promoting Gusto products, services, and features on other sites or apps that you may use or visit. Under some applicable privacy laws, these advertising activities may be considered a “sale” or “share” of data, or “targeted advertising". To opt out of these uses or disclosures, you can update your consent preferences by sliding the toggles to the left and then clicking the “Confirm My Choices” button.
Consent preferences set using the toggles will only apply to the web browser you’re currently using. You will need to update your preferences for each different device or browser you use to visit our website unless you have a Gusto account and are logged in. If you clear your cookies, your preferences will also reset.
We may also disclose personal information, such as your name, email address, and contact information to our partners so they can show you ads that are more relevant to your interests or market their products or services to you. To opt-out of “sales” or “sharing” of your data, or “targeted advertising” associated with your personal information, please complete our
Opt-Out Form
.
For more details, please read our Privacy Notice.
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Contractor Only has limited-time $0/mo base offer.

Manage your entire global workforce

Learn more
The workforce OS that’s actually intelligent
Unlike “all-in-one” platforms that simply bundle tools, Rippling’s products share a deep foundation of data, which empowers people—and AI—to work smarter.
Your business data with people at the center
Rippling has your workforce’s full context—roles, locations, reporting lines, and more—even as things change. This rich data layer unlocks smarter automation, cleaner reporting, and
AI capabilities
no other  system can touch.
Shared permissions and access controls
Permissions and approvals are dynamic and role-based, automatically governing what each employee can do across every app. Define rules once and have them enforced everywhere.
Get enterprise-grade reporting for real-time visibility everywhere
Get end-to-end business intelligence across any department with your workforce and business data all in one place. It’s easy to join and pivot data, build calculated fields, and more.
Go from prompt to productivity in seconds
Explore prompts
Play video
1:00
When everything runs on one system, work moves faster
Replace dozens of tools, handoffs, and manual work with one unified platform.
Save money by eliminating duplicate systems
One platform replaces overlapping tools and admin effort, cutting software spend and saving you time.
Automate end-to-end workflows, not just tasks
Onboard new hires, run payroll, manage performance, and issue devices and corporate cards instantly and without switching systems.
Start with the right data, get AI that actually works
Unified, structured data gives AI full context so it can answer real questions and take real action, not just generate text.

Explore 600+ out-of-the-box integrations
Single source of truth
Create a unified app experience
Native integrations don’t just keep your systems in sync. They unlock rich platform capabilities for greater control over your entire tech stack.
Automate app management
Supergroup rules for app access let you group, manage, and automate user permissions to your integrated apps as roles change across the employee lifecycle.
Cascade changes across apps
Attribute mapping allows updates made to user fields in Rippling—like photo, department, or preferred name—to automatically apply to your third-party apps.
Keep the work flowing
Use Rippling’s platform capabilities to run reports across your third-party app data or trigger workflows–like automating a Slack alert based on a Zendesk ticket.
Get your apps talking
Eliminate busy work on both ends by keeping everything in sync, like sending contribution choices to your 401(k) provider and then pulling that data into Payroll.
Identity & Access Management
Get access right, every time
Automatically grant the right people the right level of access to third-party applications—right when they need them.
Learn more
Efficient
Automatically provision and deprovision accounts from onboarding to offboarding.
Secure
Deploy SSO and RPass so your people don’t need to remember complicated passwords.
Dynamic
Leverage hundreds of user attributes to automatically manage user groups within your apps.

FAQs
What unique features do Rippling integrations offer?
Rippling offers a robust, secure, and streamlined integration experience , empowering users to efficiently manage their HR, IT, and Finance operations. Our integrations feature data Import and compensation data models, security and authorization features, Integration setup and growth, along with Analytics, Billing, and best practices.
What integrations are available with Rippling?
Rippling makes various integrations available on day one. Some of our key integrations include:
Third-party Apps Integration: Rippling supports over 650 app integrations, aiming to increase this number significantly.
Accounting Integrations: Popular accounting software integrations include QuickBooks Online, Xero, NetSuite, and Sage Intacct.
401(k) Integrations: These integrations sync data between Rippling's payroll product and 401(k) providers.
Single Sign-on (SSO): Allows seamless access to applications from the Rippling dashboard.
User & Role Provisioning: Enables user management within applications.
License Provisioning: Rippling can provision new seat licenses in systems through an API.
API Access Package: Provides customers with API access for building internal integrations.
How do Rippling integrations enhance your business operations?
Integrations play a crucial role in enhancing business operations by streamlining processes and improving efficiency.
Reduced Errors: Integrations reduce errors from manual entry, ensuring accurate data across systems.
Efficiency: Automatic updates through integrations save time and effort by eliminating the need for manual data entry.
Financial Accuracy: Integrations allow accounting and payroll information to be included in financial statements, ensuring financial accuracy.
Compliance: Integrations help in generating accurate tax forms for both payroll and business taxes, ensuring compliance.
Matching Ledgers: Integrations help in aligning books and payroll ledgers, ensuring consistency and accuracy in financial records.
How do Rippling integrations seamlessly connect with other systems in Rippling?
Rippling integrations connect with other systems through various mechanisms and features:
Integration Mechanisms:
Single Sign-on (SSO): Allows seamless access to applications from the Rippling dashboard, enhancing customer access management and security.
User & Role Provisioning: Enables user creation and management within applications, automating employee lifecycle management.
License Provisioning: Rippling can provision new seat licenses in systems through an API on behalf of customers.
Account Provisioning: API-based provisioning of new accounts (organizations) in applications.
Resale, Billing, and Co-marketing: Rippling sells products, bills customers, and engages in co-marketing activities with partners.
Immediate Exposure: Supported applications gain exposure to Rippling's customer base, facilitating product showcasing and customer acquisition.
How can I get started with installing an integration on my Rippling account?
To install an integration, such as the Nest integration, follow these steps:
Install the app from the Rippling App Shop or initiate it from payroll.
Confirm that you are the appropriate admin for the integration.
Provide your Nest username and password for Rippling to access your account.
Provide your Nest employer reference number.
Select the Pension scheme(s) to sync to the third party.
Review or import your existing Nest pension setup into Rippling payroll.
Manage employee account matching for API connections.
Set up attribute mapping with smart defaults.
Manage sync timing for contributions and enrollments.

pricing.notes: No public tier pricing. Rippling uses a modular pricing model — customer picks products (HR, Payroll, IT, Finance, Global) and receives a custom quote. Historically starts around $8/user/month for core HRIS with add-ons priced per module. Sales-led motion; company size selector on pricing form ranges from 1-10 to 1001+ employees.

Establish a Strong Foundation
Support your team from day one with essentials like payroll, benefits, HR, and compliance. With the basics covered in Justworks, you can reduce manual processes and dedicate more time to reaching your business goals.
A Solution for Every Stage
As your needs shift, seamlessly unlock new capabilities in the Justworks HR platform. Add benefits access, time tracking, dedicated HR consulting, contractor management, and more without the disruption of learning a whole new system.
Build a Connected Global Team
Hire where you want, without spending hours or additional funds required to set up a foreign entity. With one platform for all employees and contractors, international or US-based, managing a distributed team stays simple, even as hiring scales.
Support Where it Counts
When you’ve got questions that need answers fast, our team is there for you. Whether it’s a tax deadline, compliance question, or benefits change, connect with our award-winning team of trained experts via phone, email, or chat built right into our platform.
Real Impact for Our Customers

How We Simplify HR for You
The numbers say it all. Join the thousands of small businesses that partner with Justworks to handle their payroll, compliance, benefits, and HR each year.
$31B
Payroll Dollars Processed in 2025
Payroll Processing Expertise
You can rely on us to help you run payroll stress-free. To put some numbers on it, we processed over $31 billion in payroll in 2025. In other words, we’re not new to this.
$8.9B+
Total Taxes Processed in 2025
A Stress-Less Tax Season
Take care of your business, we’ll take care of the tax filing. In 2025, Justworks processed $8.9 billion in total taxes. That's billion with a “B.”
268K+
W-2s Generated in 2025
Documents Filed and Ready to Go
Sit back while we take care of filing W-2s and 1099s for you. We generated over 268,000 W-2s for our PEO customers in 2025. You can trust us to get the job done to give you more time back for what you do best.
4,000+
Tax Localities Supported
Remote Expansion Simplified
Expand into other states or hire remotely stress-free. Justworks PEO supports over 4,000 tax localities, which makes it easy for us to help file your employer-related taxes.
Ready to Explore Justworks?
Whether you’re scaling a local team or making your first international hire, get the tools, benefits, payroll, and HR compliance support you need on one seamless platform.

analysis.name: Justworks
analysis.tagline: A Platform Flexible Enough for the Small Business Journey
analysis.value_proposition: Integrated HR, payroll, benefits, compliance, and global hiring platform for small businesses, delivered as a PEO with human support.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small and mid-sized businesses that want a PEO to handle payroll, benefits, HR compliance, and international hiring without building the infrastructure themselves

differentiators: Full PEO model (co-employment) bundles benefits access, compliance, and workers' comp under one platform
Transparent, published per-employee pricing with no implementation fee
4,000+ tax localities supported
24/7 human support via phone, email, and chat
Access to enterprise-grade benefits (medical, One Medical, Kindbody fertility, 401k) for small businesses
EOR available on the same platform as domestic PEO/payroll for a unified global team view

recent_ships.source: $31B Payroll Dollars Processed in 2025 / $8.9B+ Total Taxes Processed in 2025

G2 rating 4.6, Product Hunt rating 4.6
complaints: G2 reviews page was not loadable in scrape; specific complaints not captured from public G2 in this pass

tiers.name: Payroll
tiers.headline_inclusions: Payroll for all employees, HR tools, expert support, access to time tracking

tiers.name: PEO Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Payroll, compliance, HR consulting & tools, 24/7 support, 401(k), time tracking access

tiers.name: PEO Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in PEO Basic plus medical/dental/vision admin, HSA/FSA, mental health, fertility benefits

tiers.name: EOR
tiers.headline_inclusions: Employer of Record for teams expanding globally

pricing.notes: Payroll plan carries a $50/month base fee on top of the $8/employee; PEO Basic, PEO Plus, and EOR have no base fee. No implementation fee. Prices are per employee per month. PEO plans require workers' comp enrollment.

Launch and integrate apps
smart_toy
MCP Server
Connect AI agents to workforce data
Expose contracts, people, payroll, and time data to Claude, ChatGPT, or your own agent with Deel’s MCP server. OAuth, scoped access, and tool discovery out of the box.
Connect Deel to your AI agent
north_east
extension
App Store
Build an integration for the Deel App Store
Get your integration in front of 40,000+ Deel customers. OAuth install flow, managed listings and review, and the Partner API — everything you need to drive adoption from day one.
Build & publish your Deel app
north_east
public
Deel Embedded
Global employment infrastructure, via API
Build global employment natively into your product — your team owns the UX, Deel stays invisible. Built on owned infrastructure across 130+ entities in 150+ countries. 50M API calls per month at 99.95% reliability.
Build with Embedded
north_east
One platform for every integration
Deel Payroll
expand_more
Globally standardized payroll with local execution. Designed for multi-entity complexity and audit readiness without disrupting local in-country processes.
Deel Hire
expand_more
Execute hiring and acquisitions immediately. Use EOR and Contractor models to launch teams in days, not months, while Deel owns the legal and compliance risk.
Deel Mobility
expand_more
Manage relocations and cross-border moves with structured processes and expert support, without operational disruption.
Deel IT
expand_more
Provision, ship, secure, and manage devices globally with policy-based controls that fit enterprise workflows.
What will you build on Deel today?
Hire and pay global employees
Enable global hiring workflows
Turn a job offer into a fully onboarded employee in 150+ countries, with contracts, compliance, and payroll included.
Build a global hiring flow
arrow_forward
Automate payroll operations
Push raises, bonuses, deductions, and expense reimbursements into payroll automatically. No spreadsheets, no missed deadlines.
Build a payroll inputs flow
arrow_forward
Sync workforce cost and payroll data
Stream salary, tax, and employer cost data from Deel into your BI stack, giving finance teams visibility into global headcount spend by country, entity, or worker type.
Build a workforce cost feed
arrow_forward
Pay and manage contractors
Automate contractor onboarding
Generate a compliant contract, collect a signature, and capture KYC and bank details before the worker logs their first hour.
Build contractor onboarding
arrow_forward
Process contractor payments
Submit hours and receipts from your own product, route approvals, and push them straight through to the next payout.
Build a time & expense flow
arrow_forward
Trigger real-time payments
Trigger off-cycle payments, milestone payouts, and bonuses in 120+ currencies. No payroll cycle required.
Build a payments flow
arrow_forward
Wire Deel into your stack
Sync workforce systems and identity
Two-way sync with your IdP or HRIS so a new hire shows up everywhere they need to, and a leaver disappears just as cleanly.
Sync people across systems
arrow_forward
Automate compliance workflows
Run background checks, right-to-work, screenings, and immigration cases through one API, and prove it to auditors later.
Automate compliance
arrow_forward
Trigger event driven automations
Subscribe to contracts, payments, timesheets, and approvals. Trigger Slack alerts, Jira tickets, or your own logic the moment they change.
Build event-driven flows
arrow_forward
Need anything else? We’re here.
forum
Join the community
Chat with other developers building on Deel in Deel Stack.

Get a Demo
Start Free Trial
Frequently Asked Questions
What does BambooHR do?
BambooHR is the complete HR platform that brings all your employee, payroll, time, and benefit information together in one place, giving you the data accuracy, security, and coordination you need to sleep soundly.
Does BambooHR do payroll?
Yes. BambooHR has its own add-on payroll solution that allows data to flow automatically, reducing the risk of double entry and making payroll runs quick and easy. In addition to seamless data flow, payroll customers also enjoy comprehensive payroll reporting, superior customer support, and full-service tax filing. Learn more by visiting the
product page
on the BambooHR website.
How much does BambooHR cost?
BambooHR pricing varies depending on the number of employees at your organization and the features you select. To get a free price quote, call 1-866-387-9595 or visit our
pricing page.
How many countries is BambooHR in?
BambooHR serves customers in over 150+ countries.
Is your support team outsourced?
No, our support team is entirely in-house to ensure you receive the best service possible.
Is BambooHR a PEO?
BambooHR is an HR software solution, not an outsourcing provider. While we don't provide HR staff for you, we do offer top-notch tools that help time-strapped HR professionals perform the work of many. Even a one-person HR department can use BambooHR to analyze people data, hire talent, onboard new employees, manage compensation, and help strengthen their company culture. And that's just the beginning.
Where's my data housed? How secure is BambooHR?
BambooHR customer data is hosted in the United States, Canada, or Ireland, depending on the location and needs of individual customers and applicable laws. All information is encrypted in transit, and sensitive fields are encrypted at rest. In addition, the data center located in Ireland meets all of the data requirements of the European Union, European Economic Area, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
We use a Zero Trust model to keep your data locked down at every level, and we take multiple measures to ensure it stays that way. Here are just some of the measures we take to prevent data leaks and unauthorized data access:
Defense in Depth multi-level data security
Annual third-party SOC II security audit
Frequent vulnerability scans
SAML Support
Web application firewall
Annual penetration test
In a rush? Try BambooHR now!
Start Free Trial

Title
Company Contribution Carryover for Age-Banded Medical Plans
Date of release: 06/30/2026
Save time setting up age-banded medical buy-up plans by automatically carrying over company contributions from a base plan. Employee costs stay accurate without manual calculations, even when base plan contributions change.
Add-on | Benefits Administration
Read Full Release Note
Contractor Management
Date of release: 06/29/2026
Contractor Management, powered by Remote, brings contract creation, compliance, and payments for global contractors into BambooHR for full global workforce management.
Add-on | Contractor Management
Read Full Release Note
Remote and BambooHR Nightly Time Off Sync
Date of release: 06/25/2026
Keep EOR employee time off records aligned automatically. A new nightly sync helps ensure Remote and BambooHR stay in sync by correcting missed or outdated time off data behind the scenes.
Add-on | Hiring
Read Full Release Note
Time & Attendance Schedules on Mobile & Time Kiosk
Date of release: 06/25/2026
Employees can now see upcoming shifts directly from the BambooHR mobile app and BambooHR Time Kiosk. With a new Schedule view and a smarter My Time widget, it's easier to stay informed, clock in on time, and plan the workweek ahead.
Add-on | Time & Attendance
Read Full Release Note
Clear Terminated Employee Data
Date of release: 06/25/2026
Bulk remove supported field data from terminated employee records while protecting required fields.
Core, Pro, Elite | HR Data and Reporting
Read Full Release Note
Printing Shift Schedules
Date of release: 06/22/2026
Create clean, shareable schedule PDFs in just a few clicks. Schedule Printing gives managers and administrators an easy way to filter, print, and distribute schedules while keeping important shift information clear and organized.
Add-on | Time & Attendance
Read Full Release Note
New York Metropolitan Commuter Transportation Mobility Tax Calculation Changes
Date of release: 06/17/2026
BambooHR now automatically calculates New York MCTMT using real-time quarter-to-date payroll totals, including threshold monitoring, catch-up calculations, and zone-based wage tracking.
Add-on | Payroll
Read Full Release Note
Bulk Actions for Project Tracking
Date of release: 06/04/2026
Admins can now archive, unarchive, and delete multiple Project Tracking projects at once in Time & Attendance to save time and reduce repetitive work.
Core, Pro, Elite | Time & Attendance
Read Full Release Note
First Three Background Checks for Free
Date of release: 06/04/2026
Try BambooHR Background Checks with even more flexibility. You can now run your first three background checks for free, making it easier to evaluate candidates and experience the value of background screening.
Core, Pro, Elite | Hiring
Read Full Release Note
Recognition & Rewards in BambooHR,
Date of release: 06/04/2026
Recognition & Rewards helps employees celebrate great work, reinforce company values, award points, and redeem rewards through an integrated recognition experience in BambooHR.
Pro and Elite | Recognition and Rewards
Read Full Release Note

praised: Core HR functions are now centralized and accessible reducing the administrative burden.
Out of all the HRIS systems, BambooHR is the easiest to connect with—it's simple, user-friendly, and a breeze to troubleshoot.
BambooHR has given me more time to do the more important things!
Streamlines our processes and makes our HR operations more efficient and cohesive.

tiers.name: Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Foundational HR automation and insights — HRIS, ATS, time-off, dashboards

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced features including performance management and deeper reporting

tiers.name: Elite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Top tier with full feature set for larger orgs

pricing.notes: Per-employee-per-month pricing with automatic volume discounts. Only Core price ($10/employee/month) is publicly visible; Pro and Elite require a quote. Free trial available. Payroll, Benefits Admin, Time Tracking, Contractor Management, Recognition & Rewards, and EOR are add-ons priced separately.

Let's find what you're looking for
Your one-stop shop for Workday Documentation
Latest News
New! Announcements history now available!
You can now view historic
Announcements
about Workday documentation from the last 12 months by selecting the
Previous Posts
link for each announcement type. As a result, we'll retire the original Community location,
Information Experience Enhancements
, on June 12, 2026.
New Video Content
We’ve published new videos in the Administrator Guide, showing how to create questionnaires in Workday using three different examples, and we'd love your feedback! See this
Content Crew post
for more information and to fill out a short survey.
New Workday AI Guide
Fresh off the press! Have a look at the new Workday AI guide for Workday Agents, Sana for Workday, and the Platform Consumption Console. You'll find setup, security, and conceptual information to help you adopt this new functionality.
Workday Content Crew
Collaborate with other customers and attend live sessions about Workday documentation by joining our user group. Check it out!

analysis.name: Workday
analysis.tagline: The Enterprise AI Platform for HR, Finance, and IT
analysis.value_proposition: An enterprise AI platform unifying HR, finance, planning, legal, and IT operations for large organizations, with a new AI layer (Sana) automating cross-functional work.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large global enterprises and mid-market organizations needing a unified HCM, financial management, and planning system with AI automation across HR, finance, and IT

Workday Extend low-code platform for custom apps on the core system
Marketplace with prebuilt partner AI agents and integrations

ADP Developer Resources
Developer Resources
Share your feedback to help us improve our developer resources.

*
) means the field is required.
Can we contact you in the future regarding your feedback?
*
Need help?
Please visit the
support page
to get access to support resources as either a partner or a client.
Sign in
Integrate with ADP’s API Platform
Let us personalize your developer experience by answering the question below
Let's go
Looking to integrate with your company’s data? Try ADP API Central
API Central makes it easy to access ADP APIs, tools and services, all in one place.
Learn more about API Central
What to expect when integrating with ADP
The integration process varies depending on whether you’re an ADP client looking to access your own company’s data or an ADP Marketplace partner selling your integration to clients on our digital storefront.
ADP clients
ADP Marketplace partners
Integrating as an ADP client*
*Process varies for international clients. Learn more about
integrating outside North America.
Learn what’s available to ADP clients
Unleash the power of ADP data
ADP provides access to robust APIs that span the employee life cycle — HR, time and labor management, payroll, and more. Simply choose which fields you want to use in your application. Here's an example of the data you can get from the comprehensive /hr/v2/workers API, used with the
ADP Workforce Now®
payroll platform.

ADP takes data privacy seriously. Representative data fields and example values shown are used for illustrative purposes only. This is neither an exhaustive list of data fields available from this API nor an actual client’s data.
Please refer to the API’s JSON request and response for a full list of data fields and sample data returned by the API as shown within
API Explorer for ADP Workforce Now
.
*Sample data fields taken from a JSON response from ADP Workforce Now. Note the number of supported data fields for a given API will vary by product.
Commonly asked questions
Access to ADP APIs is available to ADP clients, ADP Marketplace partners, and third-party integrators working on behalf of clients and partners. Clients can gain API access (and share that access with integrators) by purchasing
ADP API Central
, and then share access with third-party developers as needed.
ADP Marketplace partners
, who sell their third-party solutions on our HR storefront, must be accepted into our partner program and complete a sandbox agreement before accessing APIs.
Whether you’re an ADP client or an ADP Marketplace partner, you’ll need to log into your respective API platform (API Central for clients or the ADP Marketplace Partner Self-Service Tool for partners) and generate a mutual SSL certificate. Then, you’ll start a new project, which will grant you client credentials authorization. After that, you can start calling APIs.
Developers have access to a variety of ADP APIs that span the employee life cycle including HR, time and labor management, payroll, recruiting, benefits, and more. Available APIs vary by ADP product, such as ADP Workforce Now®, RUN Powered by ADP®, ADP Vantage HCM®, ADP Lyric, ADP DECIDIUM®, ADP iHCM®, and others.
Explore all APIs here
.
ADP does not offer integration development services directly; however, experienced ADP Marketplace partners are available to build and manage your custom integrations. Our team can recommend partners if you complete our Integration Needs Discovery Form
for companies using U.S.-based ADP systems
or
for companies using international ADP systems
.
If your company uses an ADP system based in the U.S., you can
learn more about ADP API Central here
. If your company uses an international ADP system,
learn more about ADP API Central here
.

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. analysis.name: Paylocity
analysis.tagline: Unify HR, Finance, & IT | HR & Payroll Simplified
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one cloud HR and payroll platform that unifies workforce management, benefits, talent, and compliance for mid-market employers.
analysis.ideal_customer: US-based companies with 10–1,000 employees needing a unified HCM platform to replace fragmented HR, payroll, and benefits tools

features.name: payroll processing
features.description: Full-service payroll with automated tax filing, direct deposit, and multi-state support

features.name: tax filing and compliance
features.description: Automated federal, state, and local tax calculations, filings, and deposits
features.evidence_quote: Paylocity handles payroll tax filing on behalf of clients

features.name: benefits administration
features.description: Open enrollment, carrier connectivity, ACA compliance, and benefits eligibility management
features.evidence_quote: Manage benefits enrollment and carrier connections from one platform

features.name: time and attendance
features.description: Clock-in/out, scheduling, time-off requests, and overtime tracking integrated with payroll
features.evidence_quote: Time & Labor tracks hours, schedules, and attendance in real time

features.name: employee self-service portal
features.description: Employee-facing portal for pay stubs, W-2s, benefits, time-off requests, and profile updates
features.evidence_quote: Employees access pay, benefits, and HR info anytime via self-service

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android app for employee self-service, manager approvals, and time tracking
features.evidence_quote: Mobile app available for iOS and Android

features.name: applicant tracking system
features.description: Built-in ATS for job posting, candidate tracking, and hiring workflow management
features.evidence_quote: Recruiting module with applicant tracking and job board posting

features.name: onboarding
features.description: Digital new-hire onboarding with e-signature, I-9 verification, and task checklists
features.evidence_quote: Onboarding tools streamline the new hire experience with digital paperwork

features.name: performance management
features.description: Goal setting, performance reviews, and continuous feedback tools
features.evidence_quote: Performance module supports goal tracking and 360-degree feedback

features.name: learning management system
features.description: LMS for employee training, course delivery, and completion tracking
features.evidence_quote: Learning & Development module with course library and progress tracking

features.name: compensation management
features.description: Salary benchmarking, merit increase planning, and compensation cycle management
features.evidence_quote: Compensation tools help manage salary planning and merit cycles

features.name: hr analytics and reporting
features.description: Configurable dashboards, pre-built reports, and workforce analytics across HR data
features.evidence_quote: Analytics and reporting provide workforce insights across all modules

features.name: workforce management
features.description: Shift scheduling, labor cost tracking, and workforce planning tools
features.evidence_quote: Workforce Management for scheduling and labor cost optimization

features.name: employee surveys
features.description: Pulse surveys and engagement measurement tools built into the platform
features.evidence_quote: Survey tools let HR teams collect employee feedback and measure engagement

features.name: community (social collaboration)
features.description: Internal social feed for company announcements, recognition, and peer communication
features.evidence_quote: Community feature enables social recognition and company-wide posts

features.name: employee recognition
features.description: Peer-to-peer and manager-driven recognition with rewards tied to milestones
features.evidence_quote: Recognition tools allow employees and managers to celebrate achievements

features.name: aca compliance
features.description: ACA 1094/1095 reporting, affordability calculations, and coverage tracking
features.evidence_quote: ACA reporting and compliance tools included in benefits administration

features.name: expense management
features.description: Employee expense submission, approval workflows, and reimbursement processing
features.evidence_quote: Expense management allows employees to submit and track reimbursements

features.name: document management
features.description: Centralized storage for employee documents with e-signature support
features.evidence_quote: Document management with e-signature keeps employee files organized

features.name: open api / integration marketplace
features.description: REST API and pre-built partner integrations across 350+ third-party applications
features.evidence_quote: 350+ integrations available through Paylocity's integration marketplace

features.name: payroll on-demand (earned wage access)
features.description: Allows employees to access earned wages before the standard pay cycle
features.evidence_quote: On-Demand Payment gives employees access to earned pay between paychecks

features.name: data insights and benchmarking
features.description: Aggregated benchmark data to compare compensation and workforce metrics against industry peers
features.evidence_quote: Peer benchmarking tools leverage aggregated platform data

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on support via SAML for enterprise identity providers
features.evidence_quote: SSO support available for enterprise customers

features.name: multi-state payroll
features.description: Payroll processing across multiple US states with state-specific tax handling
features.evidence_quote: Multi-state payroll with automated tax compliance across all 50 states

features.name: garnishment management
features.description: Automated processing of wage garnishments including child support and tax levies
features.evidence_quote: Garnishment processing is handled automatically within payroll

differentiators: Unified HR, Finance, and IT platform on a single cloud system of record
Built-in social collaboration and employee community features uncommon in HCM
Peer benchmarking using anonymized aggregated data from their full customer base
Modern UX and mobile-first design compared to legacy HCM competitors like ADP and Paychex
350+ marketplace integrations with open REST API
On-demand pay (earned wage access) natively embedded in payroll

praised: Ease of use compared to legacy payroll providers like ADP
Mobile app praised for employee self-service accessibility
All-in-one platform reduces need for multiple HR tools
Payroll accuracy and automated tax filing
Community/social features for employee engagement are unique
complaints: Customer support response times can be slow, especially post-implementation
Reporting is not flexible enough — hard to build custom reports without workarounds
Implementation can be complex and time-consuming
Pricing perceived as expensive for smaller companies
System updates sometimes introduce unexpected bugs
Some modules feel less mature than the core payroll product

tiers.name: Custom (per employee per month)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pricing based on employee count and selected modules; no public rates published

pricing.notes: Paylocity does not publish pricing publicly. Pricing is PEPM (per employee per month) and varies by company size and module selection. Quotes require a sales conversation. Typical market rates observed are $22–$32 PEPM for core HR+payroll, with add-on modules billed separately.

docs.title: Developer Docs
docs.text:
Developer Docs
For AI agents: visit https://apidocs.hibob.com/llms.txt for an index of all pages formatted in Markdown and endpoints in OpenAPI.
Jump to Content
Home
Documentation
API Reference
Changelog
Subscribe to RSS feed
Become a partner
Home
Become a partner
Home
Documentation
API Reference
Changelog
Subscribe to RSS feed
Search
⌘K
Developer Docs
Welcome to the Developer Docs. Here you'll find clear, practical documentation to help you get started with the Public API and build integrations with Bob.
Start building
Explore API
Heads up, developers!
Our Developer Hub is taking a little break because... big things are happening!
The improved Hub will be back soon - better and more helpful than ever. 
Thanks for your patience!
To get notified about new updates subscribe to the changelog
RSS feed
using your application of choice (
Slack
,
Outlook
,
Chrome extension
, etc.).
Explore
Explore our Public API modules to master data models and craft seamless, tailored integrations with ease.
Getting Started with Bob's API
An introduction to the Bob Public API, including an overview of authentication, permissions, rate limiting, testing and other essential concepts.
Getting started with webhooks
Learn how to configure Webhooks for real-time event notifications.
Explore Employee data API
Explore how the Bob API manages employee data, including fields, tables and custom fields. This overview covers the key endpoints for accessing employee's data.
Explore Time off API
Understand how the Public API supports time-off workflows and how to access Time off requests and policies.
Explore Tasks API
Understand how to access General Tasks and Task lists in Bob via the Public API to automate your workflows.
Explore Docs API
Learn how to upload and access Bob's documents via the Public API.
Tutorials and use cases
Explore our tutorials to access step-by-step guides and integration tips, helping you make the most of Bob's API capabilities.
Service user access
Learn how to use Service users to access the API endpoints.
Working with Employee Search API
Step-by-step tutorial for using the employee Search API.
How to use webhooks
Learn how to use webhooks with Bob's API.
View all
API Reference
Access detailed API reference documentation to integrate and optimize seamlessly.
Employee data API reference
Access employee data, including fields, tables and custom fields.
Time off API reference
Access the details of your company time off requests and policies using the Time off API.
Docs API reference
Access documents using the Docs API.
View all
View reference for the Job Catalog, Goals, Workforce Planning, and more.
Copyright © 2025 Hibob, Inc.
All right reserved

Frequently asked questions
What types of integrations does Bob support?
Bob supports a wide range of integrations across HR software integrations and HR system integrations, as well as payroll platforms, finance tools, and IT systems. Integrations are primarily API-based, with some SFTP integrations depending on vendor compatibility.
What if the integration I need isn’t listed?
You can build it using Bob’s Public HR API or work with a HiBob marketplace partner.
How often does data sync between systems?
Most HiBob integrations sync in real time or at defined lifecycle events for seamless
HR automation
.
How does Bob prevent integrations from creating data silos?
Bob remains your single source of truth as data changes across systems.

analysis.name: HiBob
analysis.tagline: All-in-one HR, Payroll AND Finance — Loved by people. Built for growth.
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered all-in-one platform combining core HR, payroll, and financial planning for fast-growing companies.
analysis.ideal_customer: HR, Finance, and Payroll teams at scaling companies (200–2,000 employees) needing a unified people platform beyond basic HRIS

features.name: core hr system of record
features.description: Central employee database storing all people data as single source of truth

features.name: employee self-service
features.description: Employees can access and manage their own HR information and requests
features.evidence_quote: Avoid $360K-$720K in overhead. Stay lean by automating workflows and enabling employee self-service.

features.name: workflows and automation
features.description: Smart workflows and approval chains for HR processes

features.name: esign and document management
features.description: Electronic signature and document storage within the HR platform

features.name: time and attendance tracking
features.description: Track employee time, attendance, and leave

features.name: people analytics
features.description: Real-time HR analytics dashboards for headcount, DEI, attrition, and retention

features.name: hiring and onboarding
features.description: ATS-connected hiring workflows and automated onboarding flows

features.name: performance reviews
features.description: Structured performance review cycles with configurable templates

features.name: performance calibration
features.description: Manager calibration sessions to normalize performance ratings across teams

features.name: employee engagement surveys
features.description: AI-powered company surveys to measure engagement and gather feedback

features.name: learning management
features.description: Personalized learning programs for employee development

features.name: skills management
features.description: Track and manage employee skills inventory across the organization

features.name: talent analytics
features.description: Analytics focused on talent acquisition, development, and retention trends

features.name: us payroll
features.description: Native US payroll processing with tax compliance built in

features.name: uk payroll
features.description: Native UK payroll processing with local compliance

features.name: payroll hub
features.description: Centralized hub connecting Bob HR data to global third-party payroll providers

features.name: benefits administration
features.description: Manage employee benefits enrollment and tracking

features.name: tax compliance
features.description: Automated tax calculations and compliance for payroll

features.name: compensation management
features.description: Compensation cycle workflows with customizable pay bands and merit reviews

features.name: pay bands
features.description: Customizable salary bands for compensation structure and equity

features.name: ai pay insights
features.description: AI-generated insights on compensation equity and market alignment

features.name: compensation benchmarking
features.description: Market compensation benchmarking powered by Mercer data

features.name: workforce planning
features.description: Headcount scenario planning and workforce modeling for future hiring

features.name: headcount planning
features.description: Plan and forecast headcount needs tied to budget and business goals

features.name: financial insights
features.description: 150+ HR-connected financial metrics across 35+ pre-built dashboards

features.name: financial planning
features.description: Connected 3-statement financial models linking people data to P&L

features.name: vendor forecasting
features.description: Forecast vendor costs and track actuals vs. budgets (BvA reporting)

features.name: what-if scenario planning
features.description: Model different workforce or financial scenarios to support decision-making

features.name: bob ai companion
features.description: Embedded AI assistant for summarizing reviews, drafting feedback, analyzing data, and navigating the product
features.evidence_quote: Your AI assistant securely connects to your HR data to deliver sharper insights

features.name: ai review summarization
features.description: AI-generated summaries of performance reviews and feedback
features.evidence_quote: Bob helps you summarize reviews, draft feedback, and automate tasks

features.name: ai data analysis
features.description: Natural language querying of HR data for instant insights
features.evidence_quote: Bob makes sense of messy HR data, just ask and get clear insights

features.name: goal tracking
features.description: Employee and team goal setting and progress tracking (OKRs)
features.evidence_quote: View reference for the Job Catalog, Goals, Workforce Planning, and more.

features.name: job catalog
features.description: Centralized library of job roles and levels for consistent titling and comp
features.evidence_quote: View reference for the Job Catalog, Goals, Workforce Planning, and more.

features.name: time off management
features.description: Employee time-off requests, policies, and approval workflows
features.evidence_quote: Explore Time off API — Understand how the Public API supports time-off workflows

features.name: public api
features.description: REST API for building custom integrations with Bob data
features.evidence_quote: Getting Started with Bob's API — introduction to the Bob Public API

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Real-time event notifications via webhooks for lifecycle events
features.evidence_quote: Getting started with webhooks — Learn how to configure Webhooks for real-time event notifications.

features.name: employee search api
features.description: Programmatic search across employee records via API
features.evidence_quote: Working with Employee Search API — Step-by-step tutorial for using the employee Search API.

features.name: tasks api
features.description: API access to general tasks and task lists for workflow automation
features.evidence_quote: Explore Tasks API — Understand how to access General Tasks and Task lists in Bob via the Public API

features.name: document api
features.description: API for uploading and retrieving HR documents
features.evidence_quote: Explore Docs API — Learn how to upload and access Bob's documents via the Public API.

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Extend employee profiles with custom data fields and tables
features.evidence_quote: employee data, including fields, tables and custom fields

features.name: role-based permissions
features.description: Granular access controls by role for data security and governance

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on integration for enterprise identity providers
features.evidence_quote: Collaboration tools like Slack, SSO, and Google Workspace

features.name: regional compliance support
features.description: Compliance tooling for regional labor laws and payroll regulations

features.name: org chart
features.description: Visual organizational structure automatically reflecting HR data

features.name: offboarding workflows
features.description: Structured employee offboarding process automation
features.evidence_quote: Automate onboarding, reviews, and offboarding in one flow

features.name: dei analytics
features.description: Diversity, equity, and inclusion tracking and reporting dashboards
features.evidence_quote: Access real-time dashboards on headcount, DEI, and attrition

features.name: attrition analytics
features.description: Track and forecast employee attrition risk and trends
features.evidence_quote: Track engagement, retention, and headcount in real time

features.name: lifecycle-triggered automations
features.description: Automatically trigger cross-system actions based on hire, transfer, and departure events

features.name: sftp integrations
features.description: File-based data exchange via SFTP for legacy system compatibility
features.evidence_quote: integrations are primarily API-based, with some SFTP integrations depending on vendor compatibility

features.name: it provisioning workflows
features.description: Automate IT system provisioning and deprovisioning tied to employee lifecycle

features.name: your voice (engagement)
features.description: Pulse surveys and employee voice product for engagement measurement

features.name: roi calculator
features.description: Self-serve calculator to estimate financial return on Bob investment

differentiators: All-in-one HR + Payroll + Finance on a single platform
Native UK and US payroll (not just integrations)
Bob AI Companion embedded across the full platform
Connected 3-statement financial models tied to headcount
Average ROI of 254% with payback under 9 months (self-reported)
Compensation benchmarking powered by Mercer data
Open marketplace with public API and webhooks for custom integrations

praised: Ease of use — 'Why TourRadar loves Bob for its ease of use'
Data and analytics quality — 'I wanted quality data, and that's what other tools couldn't provide' (Vita Mojo Head of People)
Fast ROI — 'scaled their ROI in under three months' (Uala, 405% ROI)
Scaling support — 'Montu grew 1400% with Bob'

pricing.notes: Pricing page did not render tier details — redirected to demo request form only. Modular pricing structure implied by demo selector (Core, Talent Package, Payroll Hub, Workforce Planning, Learning, Compensation, UK Payroll each appear as separate purchasable modules). No public per-seat pricing found.

Paychex FAQs
What Is Paychex?
What Is Paychex?
Paychex is a benefits, HR, and payroll company with a mission of helping businesses succeed. With our award-winning combination of digital HR technology and advisory services, we can help you simplify your complex business challenges.
Does Paychex Do Payroll?
Does Paychex Do Payroll?
Yes, we are a payroll company, offering payroll services for small- and medium-sized businesses for over 50 years. We offer easy processing, automated tax administration, employee self-service, flexible methods of delivering your paychecks, and more. To learn more about our payroll solution, please visit our
product page
.
What Services Does Paychex Offer?
What Services Does Paychex Offer?
In addition to payroll services for businesses of all sizes, Paychex offers all-in-one technology and support, including:
HR services and consulting
Full-service PEO
401(k) and benefits administration
Credit card processing services
Business insurance
And much more (see a list of
all our solutions
)
What Is Paychex Flex?
What Is Paychex Flex?
Paychex Flex is our all-in-one platform for all things HR—payroll, time and attendance, and more. Best of all, we offer flexible support to answer your questions and help when and where you need it.
What Is the Difference Between Paychex and Paychex Flex?
What Is the Difference Between Paychex and Paychex Flex?
Paychex offers payroll, human resources, and benefits outsourcing services for businesses of all sizes. Paychex Flex is a cloud-based platform that provides access to these services, allowing businesses to manage
payroll
,
HR tasks
, and
benefits
in one user-friendly interface.
Learn more about our company
, or use the
Paychex Flex login page
if you’re a current customer or their employee.
Is Paychex Flex Easy To Use?
Is Paychex Flex Easy To Use?
Paychex Flex is built with end users in mind, making it easy to perform key functions such as adding employees, updating benefits offerings, running HR reports, and much more. The platform can help automate key HR, payroll, and benefits functions through a single platform, with the Paychex Flex app mirroring your desktop experience.
How Much Does Paychex Flex Cost?
How Much Does Paychex Flex Cost?
Paychex Flex pricing depends on your employee count and business needs. For a custom pricing quote, please contact our
sales team
.
Does Paychex Offer PEO Services?
Does Paychex Offer PEO Services?
Yes, Paychex does offer PEO services (among others), supporting businesses of all sizes with their HR administrative responsibilities.
You can expect:
Dedicated support
for your company from a payroll specialist, HR business partner, and client advocate
A customized solution
tailored to your unique needs
Unparallel

Paychex Flex Frequently Asked Questions
Here you'll find answers to common questions about logging into and accessing information in Paychex Flex® and making adjustments to your employer-sponsored Paychex 401(k) retirement plan.
Logging in to Paychex Flex
Logging in to Paychex Flex
How do I create a Paychex Flex login?
To create a Paychex Flex login, please follow these instructions:
Go to the
Paychex Flex login page
.
Click the
Sign-Up
link.
Enter the personal information requested and click
Continue.
Note: A mobile phone capable of receiving text messages should be selected for
Primary Telephone.
If not available, enter a direct phone line (no extension).
Verify the information entered and click
Yes
if accurate.
Select and answer the security questions.
Select a security option.
Create a username.
Check your email for a message to verify your Paychex Flex account.
How do I log into Paychex Flex?
Having trouble logging into Paychex Flex? Follow these instructions:
Go to the
Paychex Flex login page
.
Enter your username and click
Next
.
Enter your password and click
Next.
Provide additional information based on your personal security settings.
How do I reset my Paychex Flex login password?
Looking to change or update your Paychex Flex password? Follow these instructions:
Go to the
Paychex Flex login page
.
Under My Account, select
My Profile
.
Select
User
.
Click
Edit
.
Change your password and click
Save
to complete.
Accessing information in Paychex Flex
Accessing information in Paychex Flex
How do I get my pay stub from Paychex?
Looking to view or print your pay stub from Paychex? Follow these instructions:
Go to the
Paychex Flex login page
.
Find the
Check Stubs
tile in the middle of the screen.
To view all check stubs, click
View All
.
To download as a PDF, check the boxes of the check stub(s) you wish to view and click
View PDF
.
How do I change my phone number in Paychex Flex?
Looking to change or update your Paychex Flex phone number? Follow these instructions:
Go to the
Paychex Flex login page
.
Under My Account, select
My Profile
.
Select
User
.
Click
Edit
.
Change your phone number and click
Save
to complete.
How do I access the Paychex direct deposit form?
To enroll in direct deposit, make changes to your direct deposit bank accounts, adjust direct deposit amounts, and more, download the
Paychex Direct Deposit Form
.
Updating Paychex Retirement Information
Updating Paychex Retirement Information
How do I take a loan or withdraw funds from my 401(k) plan?
If you qualify to take a loan or distribution from your 401(k) plan, you can easily initiate the process on
Paychex Flex.
How do I take out a 401(k) loan?
To take out a 401(k) loan, the following criteria should generally be met: the plan must allow for loans, you must be actively employed with the company that sponsors the plan, your pre-tax account balance must be greater than $1,000, and your total vested balance must be greater than $2,105.26.
Looking to request a 401(k) loan? Follow these instructions:
Log into
Paychex Flex
and select
My Retirement
.
Select
Loans
.
View your available options and request a loan.
How do I take a 401(k) distribution?
In general, to take a distribution you must meet a qualifying event.  In accordance with the IRS, the following are a list of qualifying events:
Termination of employment
Termination of the 401(k) plan by your employer
Reaching age 59.5
Incurring a term of disability which is expected to last 12 months or greater
Death of the plan participant
Looking to request a 401(k) distribution? Follow these instructions:
Log into
Paychex Flex
and select
My Retirement
.
Select
Distributions
.
View your available options and request a distribution.
How do I enroll in an employer-sponsored Paychex 401(k) retirement plan?
Log into
Paychex Flex
and select
My Retirement
.
When the
Start Your Retirement Plan
tile displays, click
Get Started
.
Under
Start My Enrollment
, select
Enroll Now
.
Follow the remaining prompts.
How do I change my 401(k) contribution amounts?
Log into
Paychex Flex
or the
Paychex Flex mobile app
and select My Retirement.
Select
Contributions,
make the needed edit and then
Save
.
Paychex Oasis Frequently Asked Questions
Here you'll find answers to common questions about logging into and accessing information in Paychex Oasis.
Logging in to Paychex Oasis
Logging in to Paychex Oasis
How do I create a Paychex Oasis login?
For
Paychex Oasis Registration instructions, follow this link
. Spanish
instructions are also available here.
How do I log into Paychex Oasis?
Having trouble logging into Paychex Oasis? Follow these instructions:
Go to
Paychex Oasis Login
Enter your username and password.
Select English or Spanish and click Sign In.
How do I reset my Paychex Oasis login password?
Looking to change or update your Paychex Oasis password? Follow these instructions:
Go to
Paychex Oasis Login
Select Need Help Logging In?
Select Forgot Password.
Click Submit.
An email will be sent to the email address on file with a temporary password. You will be prompted to change your email upon login.
Accessing information in Paychex Oasis
Accessing information in Paychex Oasis
How do I get my pay stub from Paychex Oasis?
Looking to view or print your pay stub from Paychex Oasis? Follow these instructions:
Go to
Paychex Oasis Login
Find the Check Stubs tile on the far-right side of the screen.
To view all check stubs, click See All Pay Stubs.
To download:
Click the check number in the left column.
Click View Earnings Detail
Click Download.
How do I change my phone number in Paychex Oasis?
Looking to change or update your phone number? Follow these instructions:
Go to
Paychex Oasis Login
Under Profile, select Personal Details.
Click Edit.
Change your phone number and click Save to complete.
How do I access the Paychex Oasis direct deposit form?
Go to
Paychex Oasis Login
Under Profile, select Direct Deposit.
You can either add direct deposit information or edit existing information.
How can I complete my onboarding paperwork?
To complete your I-9 and other new hire paperwork, please log into our
Electronic Onboarding System
. This information can also be found within the Employee Support section of Paychex.com under Paychex HR PEO.

Global employment runs on Remote
Hire and pay anyone in the world — with the compliance, reliability, and local expertise that only owned infrastructure delivers.
Book demo
Sign up
GLOBAL COMPANIES GROW WITH REMOTE
How we do it
One system of record. Every employment need.
Employer of Record (EOR)
Need to hire anyone, anywhere? We handle the employment contract, taxes, benefits, and compliance — onboarded in hours, not months.
Learn More
Global Payroll
Accurate, compliant payroll in every country you operate. Run by our in-house teams, no partner network.
Learn More
Contractor of Record (COR)
Engage international contractors compliantly. Contracts, payments, and risk — all handled by our experts.
Learn More
Contractor Management
Engage contractors compliantly, anywhere — and convert them to FTEs before misclassification risk becomes a legal problem.
Learn More
Professional Employer Organization (PEO)
US hiring without the admin burden. Payroll, taxes, benefits, all taken care of.
Learn More
How we do it
One system of record. Every employment need.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Intelligent infrastructure
Owned end-to-end infrastructure, operated in-house.
We have our own legal experts, our own payroll specialists, and our own compliance teams in every market we operate in. And because it's all ours, everything lives in one place: every employment record, contract, compliance document, and payroll engine run accurate, current, audit-ready,
SOC 2 Type 2
compliant, and
ISO 27001 certified
.
Hiring internationally, converting contractors, or consolidating payroll? Talk to our team.
Book demo
Your workflows, your way, on our infrastructure
MCP
Deploy AI agents on real employment data
Remote MCP gives any AI agent a live, secure connection to payroll, contracts, compliance data, and org structure — no API keys, no exports, no custom integrations needed.
Learn more
Integrations
Plug Remote into your stack
Keep the HR tools your team already uses. Remote runs the payroll and compliance underneath, natively integrated with Workday, HiBob, BambooHR, Personio, and more.

API
Build on top of ours
Remote is API-first by design. Use our REST API, webhooks, and CLI to build custom workflows, embed global employment into your own product, or extend Remote however your business needs.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do you require deposits or accruals?
We collect reserve payments in rare, high risk circumstances. This is a form of financial security that enables us to pay employees even if the customer is unable to pay us. Other EOR providers charge additional deposits for offering PTO above the legal minimum, removing probation periods, incentive plans and monthly severance accruals. We don’t.

Seamlessly manage — and give employees access to — comprehensive benefits packages.
Learn more about our
benefits
Headache-Free Payroll
Take care of all aspects of payroll processing, helps to ensure timely, accurate payment and payroll tax compliance.
Learn more about
payroll
Risk Mitigation and Up-to-Date HR Compliance
Navigate the complexities of employment-related compliance concerns, staying up to date with federal, state and local requirements.
Learn more about risk
mitigation
A Complete HR Platform
Intuitive tools to help automate HR processes like time tracking, leave requests, and more.
Learn more about our HR
platform
Go Global
International payroll, benefits, compliance—managed with ease through a single experience.
Learn more about
global
Optimize HR with ease
We offer a range of HR solutions tailored to your industry and at any stage of the company, whether you’re enhancing an existing program or building something from the ground up. Get access to benefits, technology and expertise you need to move your business forward.
Learn more about our solutions
Don’t just take our word for it.
Recent Insights
Culture
Building a Thriving Multigenerational Workforce: How SMBs Can Turn Differences into a Competitive Advantage
Today’s workforce is more diverse than ever, not just in background or geography, but in age and experience. Four generations are actively working side by side: Baby Boomers, Gen X, Millennials, and Gen Z. For small and medium-size businesses (SMBs), this creates both complexity and opportunity.
June 29, 2026
Read
More
Industry Insights
California Stats: What Workplace Data Says, Regionally
New California workplace data reveals what employees actually value—from benefits and flexibility to turnover risk. See where employers are misaligned and how to close the gap.
June 29, 2026
Read
More
AI
AI for Admin. Never for Clinical. Inside One California Practice's Operating Rule.
California employers use AI 14 points more than their employees. One founder explains why she uses it— except where judgment matters.
June 29, 2026
Read
More
View All Insights
Frequently Asked
Questions
How do I know if I need a PEO or ASO?
Every business is different. Our free HR Solution Assessment helps you determine whether a PEO, ASO, or similar solution could be the best fit for your needs.
Take the
Assessment
What size businesses do you work with?
We work with small to medium-size businesses with five to more than 1,000 employees. We tailor our solutions to your company’s needs.
Connect with us
now
How does your pricing work?
Many factors go into our pricing structure, including the state of your business and the size of your company. Once you meet with one of our consultants, we can provide a personalized quote.
Connect with us now
What HR solutions do you offer?
We offer two HR solutions tailored to your needs: our full PEO offering, TriNet PEO, and our platform plus support solution, HR Plus.
Connect with us now
Learn how TriNet’s comprehensive HR solutions can help your business.

Most cookies are "session cookies," meaning they are automatically deleted at the end of a browsing session. These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you and your interests. They also perform functions like ensuring that ads are properly displayed and, in some cases, selecting advertisements that are based on your interests.

Performance and Functionality Cookies
These cookies are used to improve and personalize your experience while visiting our site. They do this by helping us remember your preferences (e.g., language settings or login details), enabling certain tools to function (e.g., use of chatbots or commenting abilities), and providing us with metrics to improve technical performance (e.g., load speeds or bounce rates). While these cookies allow us to optimize your user experience, they are not essential for this site to work properly. Please note that, without these cookies, certain features may become unavailable.
